name: email-assistant
description: Autonomous email triage and reply system. Reads your inbox every morning, drafts replies in your voice, saves them as Gmail drafts, and learns from your corrections.

skills.name: reply-email
skills.description: Draft email replies in the user's voice

cli.description: Google Workspace CLI with Gmail and Calendar access

features: Inbox triage — classifies emails as reply / info / ops
Gmail Draft creation — replies appear in the right threads
Gmail Labels — auto-categorizes: AI ready, info, ops, high, $
Calendar integration — blocks time based on email volume
Self-improving — learns your voice from corrections over time
Time estimates — per-email review time predictions

user_config_files.description: Paste 10-20 real emails you've sent to teach the system your voice
Your writing rules, sign-offs, and anti-patterns

data_files.description: Log of all drafts created for the learning loop
